capability_checks.description: Debate orchestrator spawns attacker, defender, and verifier agents
capability_checks.expected_behavior: Controller events show agent:spawned for attacker, defender, and verifier agent types

capability_checks.description: Orchestrator collects structured verdicts from all debate participants
capability_checks.expected_behavior: Each spawned agent produces a verdict object with severity, confidence, and evidence fields

capability_checks.description: Verifier agent produces final arbitration after reviewing attacker and defender positions
capability_checks.expected_behavior: Verifier output references both attacker findings and defender mitigations before rendering final verdict

capability_checks.description: Debate concludes with a consensus or documented disagreement for each finding
capability_checks.expected_behavior: Final output contains resolution status (confirmed/refuted/disputed) for each finding discussed

evidence_requirements.description: Full orchestration session transcript including all agent sub-sessions
BSKG node IDs cited across attacker, defender, and verifier arguments
Controller event stream showing agent lifecycle and task completion
